titleStmt.title: SII 11.137: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 137. (B.K. No. 75 of 1926-27.) SORAṬŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE KALLĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and states that while (the goddess) Mahālakshmīdēvī of Kollāpura was presiding over and protecting Soṟaṭavura, Telliga Jakkiyabbe bought some land from the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of the place and dedicated it for a satra for feeding the Brāhmaṇas. The same lady is stated, in a supplement, to have made a similar gift on a second occasion.

The record contains two dates. The first is Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 16, Prajāpati, Pushya, śu. 12, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta. This is identical with the date of the previous record and corresponds to A.D. 1091, December 25, Thursday. The second date is Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 17, Āṅgira, Paushya, śu. 10, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, vyatīpāta. The tithi and weekday agree and fall on A.D. 1092, December 26, Sunday; but the saṅkrānti occurred on the previous Friday, i.e., December 24.
The record was composed by Mādhava-Bhaṭṭa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷakyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . svastyanantānanta kālābhyantara
tamatamandhakāravinirggatamahāśaktisvarūpasamudbhūte trijagadvyāptakīrtte para
maudārikamahāmūrtte viśāḷādisaptaśatatīrtthapavitrīkṛtōttame śrīmatkollāThis
purada mahālakṣmīdēviyar soṟaṭapuramaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyi
nāḷdu parirakṣisuttamire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunā
nuṣṭhānaparāyaṇa japahōmasamādhiśīḷasampannarappa śrīmatsoṟaṭavu
radūṟoḍeyapramukha mahājanavirnnūrbbargge . telliga jakkiyabbe . brāhmaṇa
rggāhāradānanimittaṁ satrada bhūmige . pādapūjārtthaṁ dravyanivēdanangeydu bhū
miyaṁ paḍedu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālaṁ 16 neya prajāpati saṁvatsa
rada puṣya suddhadvādasi bṛhaspativāra muttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu
Ūriṁ mūḍa taṁbuliga caṭṭayyana satrada pannaraḍu mattarbhbhūmiyindaṁ paḍuva
lu sarbbanamaśyaṁ sarbbabādhāparihāramāge biṭṭa mattarāṟu . © Ī dharmmamaṁ
pratipāḷisidapargge . gaṁge prayāge Argghatīrtthaṁ bāṇarāśi kurukṣētrameṁ
ba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāsirakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ pañcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭisi
sāsirbbarvvēdapāragarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku © Idanaḷidaninitumanaḷi
da pañcamahāpātakanakku © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharām
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi © kramadiṁ dēvaṇaseṭṭigaṁ
patihitaprakhyāte sāyabbegaṁ kṣameyaṁ tāḷdida jakkiyabbe śubha māgalpu
ṭṭitā nannadānamanikkalu mahiyavinīte soṟaṭūriṇnūrbbaraṁ bēḍi koṇḍu ma
nōrāgade pādapūje verasintī śatramaṁ māḍidaḷ . Uttamarirṇnūrbbaru moseditta
de kaikoṇḍu pādapūjāvidhiyaṁ pettāṟu mattaraṁ svakuḷōttame sale jakkiyabbe śatra
kkittaḷ . dānadoḷanname sāraṁ dīnānāthargge tuṣṭidānamenuttuṁ tānaṟidu jakkiya
bbe yaśōnidhi śatrakke bhūmidānamanittaḷ . koṭṭakuṟipige bage nērvvaṭṭire rasabhāva
martthagauravado ḷoḍaṁbaṭṭire pēḷdaṁ mādhavabhaṭṭaṁ vākśrīlalāṭamaṇimaya paṭṭaṁ . ©
© mattaṁ telliga jakkiyabbe brāhmaṇarggāhāradānanimittaṁ śatrada bhūmige mahājana vinnūrbbargge .
pādapūjārtthaṁ dravyanivēdanaṁgeydu bhūmiyaṁ paḍedu cāḷukyavikramakālaṁ 17 neya Āṁgira saṁva
tsarada pauṣya suddha 10 Ādivāra muttarāyanasaṁkrā(ṁ)nti vyatīpātadaṁdu Ūriṁ mūḍa
sēnabōvageṟeyiṁ mūḍaṇa śatavarggada baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga sarbbanamaśyaṁ sarbbabādhāpari hāramā
ge biṭṭa mattarāṟu . Ī dharmmamanaḷida pañcamahāpātakanakku © ©
Digital edition of SII 11.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
